basic_details.job_title: DCPU Sukma Counselor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Sukma (DCPU Sukma)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Sukma (DCPU Sukma) Counselor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website sukma.gov.in. A total of 1 Counselor vacancy has been announced through the DCPU Sukma Counselor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable as per Chhattisgarh Government rules, with a maximum age of 45 years with all relaxations combined.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Social Work/Sociology/Psychology/Mass Communication from recognized university or PG Diploma in Counseling and Communication
qualification.details: Graduate in Social Work/Sociology/Psychology/Mass Communication from a recognized university or PG Diploma in Counseling and Communication.

selection_process: Merit List based on Academic Percentage (70%) and Additional Experience Marks (max 10) Personal Interview (20 marks)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Sukma Counselor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://sukma.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Sukma Counselor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCPU Sukma Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DCPU Sukma Counselor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DCPU Sukma Counselor Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Graduate in Social Work/Sociology/Psychology/Mass Communication from a recognized university or PG Diploma in Counseling and Communication.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Sukma Counselor Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable as per Chhattisgarh Government rules, with a maximum age of 45 years with all relaxations combined.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Sukma Counselor Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

content_sections.heading: DCPU Sukma Counselor Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Merit List based on Academic Percentage (70%) and Additional Experience Marks (max 10) Personal Interview (20 marks)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Sukma Counselor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://sukma.gov.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Sukma Counselor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Sukma Counselor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DCPU Sukma Counselor position is 03 August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Counselor post, candidates must hold a Graduate degree in Social Work, Sociology, Psychology, or Mass Communication from a recognized university. Alternatively, a PG Diploma in Counseling and Communication is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Counselor position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Counselor post is between 21 years and 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the rules and regulations of the Chhattisgarh Government.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Counselor post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 18536.00. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Merit List based on academic percentage (70%) and additional experience marks (up to 10), followed by a Personal Interview (20 marks).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the DCPU Sukma Counselor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the DCPU Sukma Counselor Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Counselor in the District Child Protection Unit Sukma.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of DCPU Sukma?
faq.answer: The official website of the District Child Protection Unit Sukma is https://sukma.gov.in/. Candidates can visit this website for more information and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q10. What documents need to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of necessary documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates, along with the filled application form.
